backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Quick-Groceries backend, defining data types (Product, Order, Category, PromoCode, Offer, Payment) and CRUD endpoints with admin access control, delivery settings, and blob storage mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that maps legacy actor state (float prices, old order/product/promo shapes) to the new normalized types (Nat prices, updated Order/Product/Category structures) for canister upgrade compatibility.
backend/role-management.mo: Module managing per-principal session roles using a Map, exposing set/clear/get helpers built on top of the AccessControl UserRole type.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping feature IDs and titles to their implementing frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs for traceability across the Quick-Groceries app.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for components, pages, hooks, and context modules.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Groceries & Food Delivery' that mounts the React app into a root div via the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all app routes (home, products, checkout, order success, orders, admin), wraps the app in ThemeProvider and CartProvider, and conditionally shows a profile setup modal for new authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a full-page access denied message with a shield icon, customizable message, and optional login/home navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/admin/OffersMana: Admin panel section for managing delivery settings, promotional offers, and promo codes, composed of three sub-sections each backed by corresponding query/mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin table view of all orders sorted by date, allowing admins to update each order's status (Pending, Confirmed, Delivered) via a dropdown select.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentMan: Admin table view of all payments sorted by timestamp, allowing admins to update payment status (Pending, Paid, Failed) and refresh the list manually.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: A reusable dialog form for creating or editing a product, with fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, discount, and stock status using react-hook-form.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductMan: Admin table view of all products with the ability to add, edit, delete, and toggle stock status, delegating form rendering to the `ProductForm` component.
frontend/src/components/CartIcon.tsx: Renders a shopping cart button with a live item count badge that opens the CartPanel slide-over when clicked.
frontend/src/components/CartPanel.tsx: A slide-over sheet showing cart items with quantity controls, delivery fee calculation, free-delivery progress messaging, and a checkout navigation button.
frontend/src/components/DemoBanner.tsx: Shows a dismissible top banner indicating demo mode when sample products are present, persisting dismissal state in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders a full-width hero banner with a background image, headline, and Shop Now / Browse Categories call-to-action buttons linking to the products page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell with a sticky navbar (logo, search, nav links, cart icon, login button), mobile drawer menu, and an Outlet for page content.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/OrderCard.tsx: Displays a collapsible order summary card with status/payment badges, item list, inferred delivery fee, and formatted order date.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with image, discount badge, stock overlay, price (with optional strikethrough), and an Add to Cart button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their display name to complete profile setup, using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and blocking dismissal until submitted.
frontend/src/components/RoleSwitcher.tsx: A fixed badge indicator in the bottom-right corner that displays whether the current authenticated user is an Admin or Customer based on the `useIsCallerAdmin` query.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for shopping cart state, persisting items to sessionStorage with BigInt serialization/deserialization, and exposing add, remove, update, and clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products, categories, orders, payments, offers, promo codes, and user profiles against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and border radius.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed sections for product, order, payment, and offers management, including a demo data seeding feature that creates preset categories and products.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page that handles address input, payment method selection, promo code application, offer discounts, and order placement with delivery fee calculation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page displaying a hero section, feature highlights strip, category grid, and a featured products section with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistoryPage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's order history sorted by date, with payment info mapped to each order and a refresh button.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page that reads order details from URL search params and displays a success message with itemized breakdown, delivery, and payment info.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Products listing page with search input and category filter buttons that filter products client-side from fetched data.
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Utility that converts a paise amount (integer) to a formatted Indian Rupee currency string using Intl.NumberFormat.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Quick-Groceries frontend, defining custom fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans, Lora), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins (tailwindcss-animate, typography, container-queries).
project_state.json: Tracks the current build state of the Quick-Groceries app, listing completed features (homepage, product listing, cart, checkout, order history, admin dashboard), architectural notes, image requirements, and schema versioning.
